chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.379 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of main case ------------------------------------ 27.02.2026 Mr. Zahoor Shah, Addl: P.G. Sindh ----------------------------------- None present for the applicant. No intimation is received. Instant Criminal Misc. Application was filed on 06.04.2024. Today counsel for applicant is called absent. The time now is 11:45 a.m. Today is Friday and this is second round. Non-appearance of counsel for applicant reflects that he has lost interest in pursuing the instant criminal miscellaneous application, which is dismissed on account of non-prosecution along with pending applications, if any. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
